text: 2. **Errors recover in place, never dead-end**: every fetch failure is one `✗ what/where/why` line plus a Retry / Edit-provider / Back select that inlines the fix and auto-retries. Includes the "reachable but not actually Ollama" case. Empty-provider entry to Models offers to jump straight into add-provider; after adding a provider, offer to assign a role immediately.
